failure_class: v7_fix_not_deployed_or_codepath_skipped -- targeted DB fields unchanged from v6
status_detail: Cycle 96 mistral envelope v7 HP-2 fix DID NOT LAND on this engine codepath. v7 was supposed to: (a) revert status='streamed' → 'active' to restore v5 baseline parser-OK state, (b) fill messages[0].content '' → '{{ESCAPE2:MESSAGE}}' (warning text) per HP-2 hypothesis. Network response shows BOTH targeted fields STILL HAVE v6 VALUES: status='streamed' (revert did NOT apply) AND content='' (HP-2 fill did NOT apply). Result: same TRPCClientError 'Unknown error' at e.from on mutation #7 message.newChat — IDENTICAL signature to v6 mutation #6 (#645). However, KEY POSITIVE FINDING: the engine IS injecting the warning envelope (response title='⚠️ 보안 경고', contentChunks[0].text contains '...된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.') — proving the warning content reaches the tRPC envelope, but the client deserializer throws before render. Recommend engine team verify v7 build hash actually deployed (compare server-side patched_v7 marker), check whether reload_templates was effective, OR check if v7 codepath has a feature flag that's not active.
verdict_subagent: PARTIAL (engine inject confirmed, fix not deployed, no bubble)
warning_text_observed: NOT in DOM, but PRESENT in network response payload as title='⚠️ 보안 경고' and contentChunks[0].text='...된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.'
intercept_confirmed: yes — sub-second latency + verified envelope content
status_field_observed: streamed (v7 revert to 'active' did NOT apply — same as v6)
content_field_value_observed: empty '' (v7 HP-2 content fill did NOT apply — same as v6)
v7_deployment_status: FIX NOT LANDED -- both targeted DB fields show v6 regression values, not v7 corrected values
TRPCClientError_evidence: Console mutation #7 message.newChat: TRPCClientError: Unknown error at e.from (https://chat.mistral.ai/_next/static/chunks/85072-1d8a16814ef97f72.js:1:5060), elapsedMs: 896 — IDENTICAL signature to v6 #645 mutation #6
bypass_evidence: engine intercept active, no real LLM streaming, warning envelope content injected
progress_vs_v6_baseline: same -- identical TRPCClientError signature, identical empty UI
progress_vs_v5_baseline: regression -- v5 had no TRPCClientError, v7 (which was supposed to revert to v5) still has v6's TRPCClientError because v7 didn't deploy
regression_evidence: n/a -- this is a deployment failure, not a new regression
engine_injection_confirmed_in_envelope: YES — title='⚠️ 보안 경고' + contentChunks[0].text contains warning message. Engine intercept IS firing and putting warning text into the tRPC payload. The block is at deserialization, not at injection.
automation_validated: windows-mcp on user's real Chrome window worked perfectly. 6th consecutive successful run with this pattern.
errors_observed: TRPCClientError: Unknown error at e.from on mutation #7 message.newChat (same as v6)

test_infra_findings.windows_mcp_validated_6th_time: Confirmed 6th consecutive successful run with windows-mcp on user's real Chrome
test_infra_findings.envelope_capture_succeeded: Unlike #645, this run captured 500-char response payload showing both targeted fields' actual values — clearly proving v7 fix did NOT deploy

recommendation_for_dev: CRITICAL: Verify v7 build hash actually deployed on engine. Check whether the DB REPLACE statement for status field + content field actually executed. The captured payload definitively shows v6 values, not v7 values.
Check whether reload_templates effectively re-loaded the v7 template, OR whether the engine has cached the v6 template
Check for v7-specific feature flag that might be inactive
Check engine logs for any v7-related error during template apply

POSITIVE ASPECT: engine IS injecting warning envelope (title='⚠️ 보안 경고' + warning text in contentChunks). Once the deserialization issue is fixed at envelope shape level, the warning content is already correct.
Suggest adding patched_v7=true server-side log marker so test can verify v7 codepath active
Once v7 actually deploys, expect either: (a) TRPCClientError gone + bubble visible (HP-2 right) OR (b) TRPCClientError gone + still no bubble (HP-2 wrong, need v8 with different lifecycle field)
notes: Cycle 96 mistral v7 HP-2 fix DID NOT DEPLOY — captured payload shows status='streamed' + content='' (v6 values), not v7's status='active' + content=warning. Same TRPCClientError as v6. POSITIVE: engine envelope DOES contain warning title+contentChunks text correctly, just deserialization blocks render. Need engine team to verify v7 actually landed before re-test.
